title: ChatGPT Is Getting Its Biggest Upgrade Ever
summary: OpenAI is reportedly planning to transform ChatGPT from a chatbot into a comprehensive AI super app integrating coding, agents, image tools, third-party apps, and workplace automation. The overhaul includes new security features like Lockdown Mode and is part of a broader competitive race with other enterprise AI tools.
writeup: The video reports on OpenAI's plans to expand ChatGPT from a chatbot into a comprehensive AI super app, folding in coding, agents, image tools, third-party apps, and workplace automation. It frames the shift as part of a broader competitive race with other enterprise AI tools. Among the concrete details: a new Lockdown Mode and other security features, alongside agentic capabilities and workflow automation. The summary presents these as reported plans rather than confirmed releases.
